markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new Managing Editors by reviewing tools, process, and expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Onboarding is tracked in Linear:** A personal project contains all Day 1 and Week 1 tasks, with instructions and links to Notion resources.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [**`team@growthxlabs.com` is the shared login:** Use this email for tools like ChatGPT to access the company's paid accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=1912.0)
  - [**Daily Geekbot updates are mandatory post-onboarding:** These stand-ups are the primary way to report progress and blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
  - [**Fathom recordings are public by default:** Set visibility to "Team" so all internal meetings are automatically accessible in the "Team Calls" tab.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)

## Topics

### Onboarding Process & Tracking

  - [**Central Hub:** The "Company-Wide Onboarding" page in Notion contains all resources (articles, videos, meeting invites).](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [**Task Tracking:** The onboarding project in Linear duplicates these tasks for tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
      - [**Access Path:** `Projects` → `My Projects` → `[Your Onboarding Project]` → `Issues`.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
      - [**Task Status:** Update each task's status (e.g., "Done") using the dotted circle icon.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
      - [**Project Status:** Mark the entire project "Completed" in the right-side properties panel when finished.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)

### Core Tools & Usage

  - [**Slack:** Day-to-day communication.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
      - [**Geekbot:** Daily stand-ups.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
          - [**When:** Post-onboarding, after pod assignment.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
          - [**Why:** Replaces manual check-ins as the official way to report progress and blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=2088.0)
  - [**Linear:** Project management and engineering tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [**Notion:** Knowledge hub for SOPs and client docs.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [**Fathom:** AI note-taker for Zoom.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [**Why:** Ensures all internal meetings are automatically accessible to the team without manual sharing.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
      - [**Exception:** Limit recordings for company-wide calls (e.g., All-Hands) to avoid duplication.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [**Loom:** Screen recording for task demos.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)

### Company Policies & Logistics

  - [**Work Overlap:** 4-hour minimum overlap with Pacific Time.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
      - [**Action:** Alice will clarify if this is a fixed block (e.g., 8 AM–12 PM PST) with Bridget (VP of Ops).](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [**Time Off (PTO):** Unlimited PTO; no pre-approval needed.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
      - [**Process:** Block time on the calendar with sufficient notice (1–2 weeks) and add your team.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
  - [**Employee Referrals:**](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
      - [Engineering roles: up to $10k bonus.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
      - [Non-engineering roles: up to $5k bonus.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
      - [**Condition:** Referred hire must stay 6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - **IT Support:** Post issues in the `#it-and-tools` Slack channel.

### Team & Reporting Structure

  - [**Danni:** Reports to **Jason Gong** (Growth Team).](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=2187.0)
  - [**Victor & Kalil:** Report to **Matthew "Panza"** (temporary manager).](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
      - [**Role:** Guides onboarding until pod assignment.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=2237.0)
      - [**Action:** Panza will assign an onboarding buddy for informal support.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=2256.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**All New Hires:**](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=2161.0)
      - [Complete all Day 1 onboarding tasks in Linear.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
      - [Set Fathom recording visibility to "Team" and record client/1-on-1 calls.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
      - [Prepare a brief intro (name, location, fun fact) for the All-Hands call.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
  - [**Victor & Kalil:**](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
      - [Attend the meeting with Kyle on Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
  - [**Alice:**](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
      - [Clarify the 4-hour PST overlap policy with Bridget.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
      - [Consult Yusuf (Head of IT) on the Apple ID/App Store issue.](https://fathom.video/share/bmGLFNzKo1amEzwAgsHuDDNUnaxALosu?tab=summary&timestamp=1994.0)
